title: Branch
description: A Queens Public Library branch / location — the core physical unit of the system, and the ONLY QPL entity with an open, machine-readable twin. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Queens Library Branches' Open Data dataset (kh3d-xhq7, 21 columns; agency 'Queens Library (QBPL)') with the branch pages on queenslibrary.org and the branch selector in the BiblioCommons catalog.

branchId.description: Branch code/slug (site/catalog/Communico key; not in Open Data).

hours.description: Opening hours ('Hours' — free text; the dataset notes hours can be viewed via the branch URL).
